[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 110010100 4
1 000010010 2
2 110110111 7
3 101010001 4
4 001111111 7
5 001010001 3
6 010010011 4
7 001010101 4

70 07 011010111 6

35 53 111111111 a
